reviews.review_description: Short and sweet, the blink mechanic is genius, the monster design is also really creepy. My first time playing I got stuck between TWO of the monsters and it scared the hell out of me, and on my second play through I got to the exit and wow the forest looks great and the ending was terrifying, super effective for how short the game actually is, I would love to see more from the creator. would recommend 👌

Very cheap, high quality, and scary. I'd love to see more projects in the future whether it's a full game or another short experience. Good work :)👍

(Be aware, this game is short. But the quality honestly makes up for it.)

reviews.review_title: I paid a few bucks for a free trial.
reviews.review_description: For $3.99, you'd think you should get a little more for what this is.  This app/game is more like a trailer for something bigger.  In that sense, trailers are free.  This isn't.  I feel like I just got scammed.  I was gonna give this 2-stars, which was generous.  But thinking more about how I just got scammed into paying $3.99 for this, I'll opt for a 1-star rating instead.  Maybe the dev will think twice before charging something for nothing again in the future.  Clearly the dev of this app/game has ZERO ethics.  SHAME.

developer_response.body: Hey there, really sorry to hear you didn't find Insomnia worth the price you paid for it. We put a lot of effort into making this, even though it doesn't have much playtime we thought a good scare might be worth the price of a Cappuccino. Sad to hear you didn't feel the same way about it... All the best to you, hope you are well!

reviews.review_title: I completed this game in 3.5 minutes
reviews.review_description: This game cost more than $1 a minute to play. Not worth the money for the length of gameplay.

Simple, but very crisp and effective. You'll figure out in a minute or two that your just supposed to let yourself get eaten and move on to another game but still, this is an impressive showing in regards to overall competency.

reviews.review_title: Made me wanna never play vr again
reviews.review_description: Dev, If you are reading this, please continue making horror games.

Insomnia is a liminal space game that gives you the heeby jeebies from the start. The object is to try and find an exit before you run into the things that crawl in the dark...
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RJnGYnriqKU

The blinking is a very clever dynamic that you need to do when it goes all blurry. 

Walk around a hotel floor trying to escape and not get caught. 

Graphics are really good and great jump scare. 

Only short experience 


Short Horror Experience Insomnia where you Blink to Survive
https://youtu.be/Xema994jPiY

The atmosphere and graphics are the best I’ve seen from a Quest 2 horror game yet. I got trapped in a corner with the monster and decided not to blink. My vision got blurry and I got jumpscared because I hadn’t blinked. Definetely the scariest experience I’ve had yet on Quest 2, and it’s free. The photos changing when you blink is a nice touch.

There is always room for improvement though. Having hands would be nice of course. Longer game with a story would be absolutely worth paying. Bigger and more diverse areas would make for an even more terrifying experience.

Also rose modeled by Finnish person??? Torilla tavataan.
Bruh i played for like three minutes and then pooped my pants and never played it agin. 100% recommend.

reviews.review_title: What is the point of this game?
reviews.review_description:
OK, I figured out my character is myopic and broke my glasses and need to blink using the trigger frequently.  But what is the point of the game?  The jump scares are fun the first 2 or 2 times but what am I supposed to DO?  

I just go in, wander one way or the other then get the jump scare, game over.  No hands so nothing to pick up or examine.  What am I missing?  Not going to ask for a refund for 3 bucks but if it would be nice to last longer than 12 seconds.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, continue looking for the right exit and hide while doing it. The game is a bit of a Groundhog Day scenario and you'll most likely have to replay several times to get out.
Thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description: I just got round to playing this. It's actually a cool little game. If you've seen Dr Who and hate those weeping angels then this is gonna scare you. You are in a hotel and you have to find the right exit. But you are tired and your vision gets blurry so you have to close your eyes to see clearly again( trigger buttons). And in that time one of those things will be getting closer. Every time you turn your back to look for the exit, they get closer. You will be constantly looking over your shoulder...

Amazing atmosphere, and just love the creepy and eerie feeling walking around in the hotel corridors. 
And based on the other reviews here then there’s more to this short horror experience than just walking around with blurry vision (some interactive elements that I apparently missed, like blinking). But even that experience was worth 5 stars!
No lie it had me screeching in my living room. Worth every penny. Looking forward to see where this goes. Kind of creeped out still. I love it.

developer_response.body: Thx for the encouraging review! We here at Krakentanz share your interrest in where this goes ;)  Glad we did creep you out ;=)

reviews.review_description: Would be nice to have options for smooth turning and a seated mode.

It’s a very very quick game but the idea of it is great. If you’re looking to introduce yourself to what a scare is like in VR spend just a couple bucks for this. The idea of this game could certainly be made into a long length game if the funding is there for it.
I got this for y r people spending money? I like it so imma give it 5 stars
The feeling of know that someone is watching you

developer_response.body: ...that's what we were going for! Glad you liked it!

reviews.review_description:
This is a great game 
It is good for thrill seekers and in all YouTubers 
I still am scared to play this game at night 
The one thing I would like it to have it 2 play the  
Experience  would be way more fun with friend but still a good game
I love the game very good game it give me cold ciles it's was really cool to Play very scary I love play it I love scary games I like the story line I like the part looking for the exit
